---
title: "What drives success"
subtitle: "Region, track, age: these factors are linked. A statistical model measures what each really contributes, once the others are accounted for."
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
source("R/common.R")
source("R/i18n.R")
source("R/figures.R")
lang <- "en"
g <- reussite_data()
```

::: {.callout-note}
This page is being translated; the narrative text is not final.
:::

## The principle

*Text to be translated.*

## The track effect

*Text to be translated.*

```{r or-serie}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 3.6
#| fig-alt: "Odds ratios by track."
fig_reu_serie(g, lang)
```

## The region effect

*Text to be translated.*

```{r or-wilaya}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 5.2
#| fig-alt: "Odds ratios by wilaya."
fig_reu_wilaya(g, lang)
```

## The age effect

*Text to be translated.*

```{r age}
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 3.8
#| fig-alt: "Pass rate by age."
fig_reu_age(g, lang)
```

## Is the model reliable?

*Text to be translated.*
